textByHashes.6b36e8ab4d83134bd62f785abf0cbf75213de9f1: About time, adventurer. Your companion here tells me we have a zombie army on our doorstep!
textByHashes.a6391c6c92353cfdcffac8b6997d375f62bc2851: Zemouregal attacking Varrock again is our greatest fear and worst nightmare. And to think he now has Arrav under his control as well... What a horrifying fate for our greatest hero.
textByHashes.e9e2ea0d3e7bc200475dc2db549a801c0b580717: What are you saying? Does this mean we might be able to save Arrav?
textByHashes.09e46f8ba36c1842cccd1426dd5c745641eba588: Well then what other options do we have?
textByHashes.d3087e184df472ca564732b941cc364646ef1d55: The Shield of Arrav? But is it really any use? Despite our attempts, we've never been able to unlock its power. Could it be that the legends were exaggerated and that it's just an ordinary shield?
textByHashes.a2ee400cd5e2b496b48fabddd54e95a5e822e378: Hmm... but are the Imcando not extinct now?
textByHashes.aa0e3b97871635ba48d0446411f03b619b248db5: Well then what are we waiting for? , speak to this Ramarno and seek his advice on how to use the shield to defend our city. In the meantime, we will prepare our defences.
textByHashes.2c64447fac4e1dbf4bcdcb95c7d6c389ac727fd5: Adventurer. Have you been to Camdozaal yet?
textByHashes.b1b0aa3a32e2c7cb26b69dd81eb61f7266ea094b: About time you showed up! The zombies have breached the northern wall and are swarming the palace! We've managed to keep them from moving on the rest of Varrock for now, but we won't be able to do so forever!
textByHashes.b2ac82faf48067e1d0badcb42207a46af9bc2bd8: The library would be your best bet. Get down there and see if Reldo can help you.
textByHashes.7b1ce1b04946ef10a20f42dff93f91a427e5ef38: Oh, and you'd better take this.
textByHashes.a3d96f1cc2c99eebd5d5ee91604b94c1a7a02e02: You're going to be needing this.
textByHashes.fca462037cb0e8f139243699d72a5cf092d6d155: Then you should get down to the library and talk to Reldo. If we don't get this situation under control, Varrock is doomed, and I'd very much prefer it if that could be avoided.
textByHashes.e5e5d61085c49efd44320051de474541e69353fa: Good. Follow this lead and see where it takes you, but be quick about it. If we don't get this situation under control, Varrock is doomed, and I'd very much prefer it if that could be avoided.
textByHashes.c65cd63c455a7ff0cf3c95de8d1e5c221877609a: And be quick about it. If we don't get this situation under control, Varrock is doomed, and I'd very much prefer it if that could be avoided.
textByHashes.db7db878fc47bc69f5258805a831b55b6ee7db26: It seems the shield worked better than anyone could have hoped for. From what we can tell, not a single zombie remains! It was a close one, but thanks to you, Varrock is saved!
textByHashes.8c51823d2f9967a8f95272d6b6c04990849db41e: Indeed. I will ensure the King is made aware of his contribution.
textByHashes.eaa3a83d614499b64e90c766e78f55a83d35bf3b: There's been no sign of him so far. We'll keep an eye out, but I suspect he'll have gone to ground.
textByHashes.e497a707da13e67e026775f248f8b0cefe80f69a: Well once again, adventurer, on behalf of Varrock, you have my thanks. Today's victory will go down in history.
textByHashes.5f2555c14154b9f976cbc13f55e3daa738e0129a: Now, you'd best be on your way. I have lots of work to do, and I'm sure you have better places to be than here.
textByHashes.a2f1387a347718910d8b5e2040e6e086eb009ef4: Oh, it's you. Thank you again for your help in defeating the zombie army.
textByHashes.05cab4f2b2b03958f550bde8524d6c7c31e64053: Now, you must excuse me. I have lots to do.
textByHashes.a17ca6f790afc714485ee141bb18da90527bbd35: What are you doing up here? Only the palace guards are allowed up here.
textByHashes.250d1454ddd2a0feaa589e654f7f48d736ecf8db: Ok, I'm listening. Tell me what's so important.
textByHashes.f58296cc4225c8e7be8e196478dfc72d4cfb5041: Well, I'm sure the palace guards can deal with it, then. Thanks for the information.
textByHashes.ca93aafb70d021e49b20e425e035860ca3a1c1c4: As good as the palace guards are, I don't know if they're up to taking on a very powerful demon.
textByHashes.2b283d4dc6e84428b934deec364a10a01f47d3ae: Wait! How dare you insult the palace guards? Get out of my sight!
textByHashes.50ee4f53f1e4b0cfaef45cae3f5574dd10872bf6: What, all by yourself? How are you going to do that?
textByHashes.d71e962aa98435354d7166fb1be2879fe26c239a: Yes, I do. But why should I give it to you?
textByHashes.13e9ea539c16c17771f4e416dc7feb14c27fe0b8: A fortune-teller? Destiny? I don't believe in that stuff. I got where I am today by hard work, not by destiny! Why should I care what that mad old fortune-teller says?
textByHashes.0084574efc9564912c63332d4a751133a69c1baf: You can't fool me! How do I know you haven't just made that story up to get my key?
textByHashes.91eb3258aeab49cac412bf99b7ebf8f2a004b1bc: Oh, he did, did he? Well I don't report to Sir Prysin, I report directly to the king!
textByHashes.15cafa4cf2fc7b7af612cee9c26d30d7e67b5e29: I didn't work my way up through the ranks of the palace guards so I could take orders from an ill-bred moron who only has his job because his great- grandfather was a hero with a silly name!
textByHashes.cb0ccf3b55f8f04cd271bf022b9bbd56dc79d138: Only because the king ordered him to! The king couldn't get Sir Prysin to part with his precious ancestral sword, but he made him lock it up so he couldn't lose it.
textByHashes.f263cbf444ae4de091525461bf432f7715f2769e: I got one key and I think some wizard got another. Now what happened to the third one?
textByHashes.ea9f05ce78aa27e70324bbfe2b96c3d8d6d0c354: Okay, I'll give you the key, just so that it's you that kills the demon and not Sir Prysin!
textByHashes.0759404856b4d72a0fcf999c129e2ecba88e513e: Yes, you said before, haven't you killed it yet?
textByHashes.8a2886abc9826135ac83eb423fc9e3ddb4163672: I already gave you my key. Check your pockets.
textByHashes.e49ca5a916178d52b2b078426f1a75a3fe6ed71e: I already gave you my key. Maybe you left it somewhere. Have you checked your bank account?
textByHashes.c534404b96b31ceddf492cd1892d35c73ab7db02: No, you're not! I know all the palace guards.
textByHashes.390dde93358c2a12b17217e457f7921d52fb42bd: I interview all the new recruits. I'd know if you were one of them.
textByHashes.e87763af12dcd013b829d594c06733f1026b9807: What sort of surgery is that? I've never heard of it. Besides, you look reasonably healthy.
textByHashes.4d6e07836a7f9345c3aa1b6f54e66ee2822d401d: Why is this relevant anyway? You still shouldn't be here.
textByHashes.d2c2bdc08b0d9c6c9a304c02312fa2105c5532f8: Well, yes, I suppose we'd let him up. He doesn't generally want to come up here, but if he did want to, he could.
textByHashes.2761bddd2069c2b4683d1714661100f40748aa90: Anyway, you're not the King either. So get out of my sight.
textByHashes.dac214b325391682ef721f33d3db67907f11da5d: Well it can't be that important then.
textByHashes.a320cb7753fe0a7cd87db36f4b9b9896285d2ead: Now that is important. However I'm the wrong person to speak to about it. Go talk to the kitchen staff.
